overall.description: A smooth aerial exploration of the Montreal Olympic Stadium complex in a game engine simulation, showcasing the distinctive inclined tower and the curved Biodôme structure. The camera moves continuously from the tower base around the plaza to circumnavigate the Biodôme under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: base of Olympic Stadium inclined tower

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the inclined tower against the bright sun

agents.ego_description: moving slowly around the base of the stadium tower, examining the brutalist concrete architecture and cable support system

entered.detail: textured concrete wall with vertical ribbing at the stadium base
the distinctive leaning Olympic Stadium tower with cable stays and white concrete finish
horizontal concrete platform structures with dark-tinted glass railings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the base of the Olympic Stadium's iconic inclined tower, showcasing the brutalist concrete architecture with vertical ribbed textures. The camera slowly pans upward and circles the structure, revealing the dramatic angle of the tower and its cable support system against a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza between Olympic Stadium and Biodôme

events.description: camera moves from the stadium tower into the open plaza revealing the curved Biodôme structure
text overlay 'BIODOME' appears on screen identifying the domed building

agents.ego_description: transitioning across the open plaza toward the Biodôme, moving away from the stadium tower

entered.detail: smooth curved concrete dome structure with dark-tinted glass entrance facade
expansive light-colored paved plaza with geometric tile patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the enclosed tower base into a wide open plaza, revealing the organic curved form of the Biodôme. The text 'BIODOME' appears on screen to identify the structure as the camera approaches its entrance, with the Olympic Stadium tower now visible in the distant left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved walkway along the Biodôme perimeter

events.description: camera rounds the curve of the building revealing side entrance and distant urban buildings

agents.ego_description: circumnavigating the curved exterior of the Biodôme, showcasing the building's smooth architectural lines and surrounding landscape

entered.detail: yellow and beige mid-rise residential buildings visible beyond the plaza perimeter
line of green deciduous trees marking the boundary of the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the curved perimeter of the Biodôme, highlighting the smooth transition between its concrete and glass surfaces. As the camera moves along the walkway, distant urban buildings and tree lines become visible in the background, showcasing the building's integration with the surrounding cityscape under the bright summer sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial movement that transitions from the towering brutalist heights of the Olympic Stadium to the organic, sweeping curves of the Biodôme. It begins at the base of the inclined tower, panning upward to emphasize the ribbed concrete textures and cable supports against a bright blue sky. As the camera descends and pulls away, the enclosed architecture gives way to a wide open plaza, shifting the focus toward the curved form of the Biodôme while the tower recedes into the distant background. The scene then follows the perimeter of the Biodôme, gliding along the smooth intersection of glass and concrete surfaces. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal distant urban buildings and tree lines, integrating the architectural complex into the broader cityscape under the bright summer sun.
